step_rationale: Systemic inflammation and cell-adhesion marker elevated in CAD.
mechanism: Galectin-4 is a lectin mediating cell–cell interactions and immune regulation, with elevated levels associated with coronary artery disease risk.

references.title: Phenotyping patients with ischaemic heart disease at risk of developing heart failure: an analysis of the HOMAGE trial.
Novel multi-marker proteomics in phenotypically matched patients with ST-segment myocardial infarction: association with clinical outcomes.
